---
pagetitle: 日記 | Yueswater Blog
lang: zh-TW
description: "Anthony 的生活隨筆，記錄日常觀察、學習心得與各種雜想。"
title: 日記
subtitle: 生活隨筆
search: false
repo-actions: false
listing:
  contents:
  - posts
  - "!index.qmd"
  - "!index-en.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 30
  feed: true
alternate-lang: "/diary/index-en.html"
---
